sections.markdown:
- Activity: Sunny Fun Run Returns 🌞
- Started: 2025-08-17 09:30
- Distance: 12.2 km
- Moving time: 1:05:16
- Elapsed time: 1:05:20
- Elevation gain: 86.4 m
- Average heart rate: 161.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 177 bpm
- Average watts: 231.2 W
- Average speed: 11.2 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `164.5 bpm`, ranging from `151.9` to `172.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `157.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `169.2 bpm` (+11.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.7 spm`, with a working range of `101.6` to `177.6 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `170.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `173.5 spm` (+2.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:20 /km` across `12.232 km` in `1:05:16` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:25 /km` and second-half pace was `5:15 /km` (-10 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `161.6 bpm` average and `177 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `156.9 bpm` in the first half and `166.8 bpm` in the second (+10.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:05:16` out of `1:05:20` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `122.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `20.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `64.4 m` in the first half and `58.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
